content.text: Cleanliness is a core value in Islam — both physical and spiritual. Ritual purity is required for many acts of worship, especially prayer.

items: Ritual dryness (tayammum) when water is unavailable.

content.text: Personal hygiene, trimming nails, keeping clothes and place of prayer clean, and regular washing are encouraged.

items: Before each obligatory prayer if nullified.
After certain acts that break wudu (natural discharges, deep sleep, etc.).
Before touching the Mushaf in some schools.

content.text: Cleanliness is half of faith — keep body and heart pure.
